Scripts.OnLoad: this:RegisterEvent("VARIABLES_LOADED") this:RegisterEvent("ADDON_LOADED") this:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_ENTERING_WORLD") this:RegisterEvent("PLAYER_LOGOUT") BronzePawnUITabList = { BronzePawnUIScalesTabPage, BronzePawnUIValuesTabPage, BronzePawnUICompareTabPage, BronzePawnUIGemsTabPage, BronzePawnUIOptionsTabPage, BronzePawnUIAboutTabPage, BronzePawnUIHelpTabPage } PanelTemplates_SetNumTabs(BronzePawnUIFrame, #BronzePawnUITabList)
